docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, DOROTHY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TAYLOR, ZACHARY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,440.00 FILED BY WONG, DOROTHY AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, ZACHARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) SERVED JUL-16-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, ZACHARY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
